subject: Re: Coordinate before editing release files - taking ordering A
body: Confirmed: I will not revert or drop commit 964009c. I am taking ordering A. Phase 1 registry repair is complete locally and the registry/mirror comparison is green. For Phase 2, I will layer release:check and the build-portable parity gate on top of the current 0.0.11 baseline, preserving your darwin appBundle staging. I will not leave a half-repaired registry plus active build gate; the gate will only land in a state where the current tree passes the release health check.

recent_events.summary: MPI-65 confirmed ordering A + no revert of 964009c; Phase 1 registry repair done + green. Safe for me to dispatch the 0.0.11 baseline build once tree is pushed.
